review_questions.question: Is the producer scope correctly split into table/data lane A75/A76/A79 and graph lane A77/A78/A80/A81?
options: A. Yes, keep the split
B. Move one or more graph candidates into the first lane
C. Hold the whole producer lane

review_questions.question: Should A75, A76, and A79 be the first mutation-review lane?
options: A. Yes, authorize review for all three
B. Authorize only A75 and A79
C. Hold A76 for dependency review
D. Hold all three
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, authorize review for all three, with A76 dependency confirmed explicitly

review_questions.question: Should A76 keep needs A14/A04, or add A61 because P, GTK, and Q are often source values?
options: A. Keep A14/A04 only
B. Add A61
C. Hold A76 until representation-specific siblings are clearer
review_questions.recommended_answer: B. Add A61 if HCS wants A76 to be source-value aware; otherwise keep A76 formula-level and document the boundary

review_questions.question: Can A77 and A78 proceed as a graph-lane mutation review after A75 exists?
options: A. Yes, after A75 and with PV graph-stage constraints
B. A77 may proceed but A78 waits
C. Hold both until PV.3 pilot visual states
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, after A75 and with PV graph-stage constraints

review_questions.question: Can A80 and A81 proceed in the same RX.3 mutation sprint, or should they wait for PV.3/PV.5 producer-graph modeling?
options: A. Proceed after A76 with PV conditions
B. A80 may proceed, A81 waits
C. Hold both until PV producer-graph pilot templates
review_questions.recommended_answer: C. Hold both until PV producer-graph pilot templates, unless HCS accepts the medium risk

review_questions.question: Should HOLD_GRAPHICAL_MO_MK_OPTIMUM remain held?
options: A. Yes, keep held
B. Move into RX.3 graph lane
C. Create a separate focused review

review_questions.question: Should all approved A75-A81 units remain generator-blocked and non-interactive until generator/projection support exists?
options: A. Yes, hard block student-facing use
B. Allow limited non-interactive display
C. Allow skill-tree exposure immediately
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, hard block student-facing use

review_questions.question: What gate status should GATE-RX3-producer-representation receive?
options: pass
pass_with_conditions
hold

required_conditions_if_passes: Run live numbering check immediately before mutation.
Use unit-add.js only; no hand edits to references/machine.
Preserve the split between table/data lane and graph lane unless HCS explicitly changes it.
Record the A76 dependency decision in the gate closure and mutation log.
Keep graphical MO=MK held unless explicitly re-approved.
Mark any newly added A-domain units generator-blocked and non-interactive.
Do not authorize diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic sequencing, mastery, summative use, or student-facing PV projection.
